title: Add US states dropdown to ProfileSetup state field
description: The state field in ProfileSetup.tsx is currently a plain text Input. It must be replaced with a Select dropdown populated with all 50 US states plus DC. The same US_STATES constant should also be used in the OnboardingForm if that component renders a state field.
acceptanceCriteria: State field in ProfileSetup renders as a Select dropdown, not a free-text Input
Dropdown contains all 50 US states plus DC (51 options), using 2-letter abbreviation as value and full name as label
Selecting a state updates the form correctly and passes Zod validation
Existing saved state value pre-fills the dropdown correctly on form load
US_STATES list is defined in src/lib/us-states.ts and imported where needed (not inlined)
tsc reports no new type errors
Playwright screenshot confirms dropdown renders and is selectable

steps.description: Create src/lib/us-states.ts with the full US states list
steps.details: Create a new file src/lib/us-states.ts that exports: export const US_STATES = [ { value: 'AL', label: 'Alabama' }, { value: 'AK', label: 'Alaska' }, ... all 50 states + { value: 'DC', label: 'District of Columbia' } ] as const. Use 2-letter USPS abbreviations as values.

steps.description: Replace the state Input with a Select in ProfileSetup.tsx
steps.details: In src/components/profile/ProfileSetup.tsx, find the FormField for name='state'. Replace the <FormControl><Input ... /></FormControl> with a <Select onValueChange={field.onChange} value={field.value ?? ''}> containing a <SelectContent> with {US_STATES.map(s => <SelectItem key={s.value} value={s.value}>{s.label}</SelectItem>)}. Import US_STATES from '@/lib/us-states'.

steps.description: Run tsc and fix any type errors
steps.details: Run npx tsc --noEmit from the project root. Fix any type errors introduced by this change.

Start dev server (npm run dev). Use Playwright to navigate to /dashboard/profile. Take a screenshot saved to .agent/screenshots/TASK-1-profile-state-dropdown.png. Verify the state field renders as a dropdown, not an input.

technicalNotes: The Select component is from src/components/ui/select.tsx (shadcn/ui Radix wrapper)
The FormField pattern using render prop with field.onChange and field.value is already used for business_type in the same file — follow the same pattern
Do NOT inline the states array in the component — it must live in src/lib/us-states.ts for reuse
